reviews.review_title: I wanted to buy the second one
reviews.review_description: I can’t find it one the store did it get taken off

developer_response.body:
Hey,
Thanks for enjoying Cave Digger and rating it 5 stars! Yes, Cave Digger 2: Dig Harder is also available and since you own the first one, you can now get the second for a special price if you get the bundle. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: The nestolga of this game hits hard
I've gotten to the point of beating the game and it's fun to get there but, you can't get most of the upgrades before you're forced to beat the game.

This is a wonderful, well drawn out mining adventure with loot, lore, and love poured into it. With tons of fun and intuitive mechanics, an expansive and interesting number of environments, and a simple but fun narrative to follow the surprisingly long yet entirely enjoyable length of the game. Few games excecute on the mine, sell, upgrade format as will as this and even less so in VR. This is among one of my favorite VR titles and I would strongly recommend it.

10/10 become a miner but tbh it crashes my whole headset semi often (only reason I didn’t take a star off because of that issue is because it’s a quest 1 and it can’t be helped from the devs really as they can’t send updates to quest 1) other than that very fun
You keep getting the same ending so glitchy worst game ever

I enjoy the basis of going down and harvest items but its so so buggy. I keep getting stuck in the delivering hole (or even outside of the lift enviroment). I need to physically lean out of my spot to get unstuck. Which is slightly frustated but if your runs are timed and you spend 3 seconds getting yourself unstock every time its a huge bummer.
I got the 1 and 2 pack and it says I have been playing for 2 hours and it won't let me refund the glichy games.
It has potential. But needs more content. ￼ it’s a little monotonous need to have more content to keep it alive and interesting. ￼
I was bored after 10 minutes just screwing around till the trial ran out

Bought it on sale for $2

Still regret my purchase
Dear dev, your original Cave Digger is a classic. However, I would like to be able to play with just SFX and no music. Currently there is no options for setting music volume. Thank you.
I would play it again if I had to money to pay for it
Needs a little work on mechanics but very sound game fun to play i hear the second one is out more too
This game I really good I love time go into the mines and go mine for some thing like diamonds or some fossils.
Fun romp
Great solo player game when you get into a groove is when you really start having fun ￼
Good Game
Fun times ahead of life mine explore enjoy
Better then the 2nd game by mile favorite PSVR2 game
Didn’t care for it but I have it…..
Wahoo
i havent played ts in years
Fun and dumb ate the same time

At first i thought the whole game was in the elevator.  Finished it by finding all 4 keys.  

Then i came back and hey... A TRAIN !!   And a whole new section to dig in.  I played a lot longer than expected.   

The game is so 6 years old in terms of FOG and and graphics. It gets repetitive.  The Underwold is pretty empty.  Feeding the statue hu ?   hehe.  and the last Ending, becoming a God should be more evident.  

Played a lot and i got the Space Train picture to prove it.     Can't wait to Dig Deeper (like my ex girlfriend used to say  haha)
Boring

I just bought the game since, conceptually, it seemed like an interesting title.
But I've found that there are a few issues that truly take the joy out if playing the game and keeping you awkwardly fighting it more than enjoying the experience.. 
The first thing is movement (as MANY others have brought up). The play area is extremely small, so you are CONSTANTLY getting stuck in the wall or on the shoot in the middle of the small elevator. This utterly wastes the already excessively small amount of time you have to dig and to pick up+ toss in the treasures you've dug up...
Snap turning being the only option for virtual rotation is also terrible in any game (and always brings the grade down for me), but snap turn mixed with getting stuck in everything in a fairly cramped play space? Absolutely nothing but frustrating...
And there are NO settings or even a way to pausethe game!

Information, guudance, ir just general simple written i structiins on hiw to use the items is also completely lacking, again adding a massive frustration in what COULD be a fun addictive little game...

Overall, I may give the game another 15-30 minutes, but what very little it offers is absolutely ruined by these control issues, height mishaps, and odd lack of ANY settings to adjust (besides the broken 2 tier height button...) or way to pause- I really just see me asking for a refund. As old as this game is now, I really don't seethe developers ever fixing said issues that many seem to have complained about already, so I'll consider it dead.

I can’t get anywhere. I’m really tall regardless of changing my boundaries and floor level etc. I can’t reach any of the buttons because I’m so tall. Constantly getting stuck. The game always glitches out so that I can see the sky when I’m inside. There’s no settings menu? WTH. I seriously can’t do anything. It’s one big glitch regardless of uninstall reinstall Bla Bla. A lot of these reviews look fake.

reviews.review_title: Works with a larger move space
reviews.review_description:
Initially I was disappointed as I was really struggling to play the game with a stationary boundary. I was always incredibly high up when I played. 

I’ve found by laying on the bed it allowed me to reach the “buttons” on the lift. I tried in a larger space but the height thing was still an issue. 

After figuring out the depth issue, I’ve now spent waaaaay more time than I’d like to admit mining VR gems. The game is great once you get your head around some glitchy movement mechanics. It would be nice for the right thumb stick to have a fluid turn rather than the jerky one it has currently. However it is a great game and the commentary has had me doing a double take on several occasions!
I played it and I realized in a couple minutes that it is an achievement game then it kept crashing when I got up to the store (I would like a refund if you could)
THE WHOLE GAME IS ABOUT ACHIEVEMENTS. At the beginning, it was fun then I realized is just about ACHIEVEMENTS
I absolutely love this game. It's so fun and in the train part I named the chest Jeremy

I don’t really understand the point of this game. You just hit and hit to collect gems. Then you can earn better tools just to hit and hit again? I love puzzle type games and I thought this was that type. This has no story line, no puzzles, nothing but banging and hitting with the tools. Very disappointing. I will be deleting this one.

developer_response.body: Hi and thanks for the comment! The elevator is just the start of the game, afterwards you unlock the train and move on to free mining in four different biomes. Also you get Chompy as a companion.

reviews.review_title: Really good game for you and the mining

It's a cute idea and could be fun, if it weren't for major glitches with the main mechanics.  Gems just float through the floor, grabbing things is iffy at best, and the pickaxe doesn't always hit the rocks.
The game is so boring and the story...don’t ask

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! What do you think the story is, just out of curiosity?

reviews.review_description: The game is boring, graphics are bad, and it’s not worth the money.

developer_response.body: The game is exciting when a random bug makes you lose one the ingredients of an ending, I like the graphics, and the concept of being worth something is challenged by the game's philosophy. I do like your review.

If I have to see the credits one more time I’m gonna blow my brains out☹️Let alone how boring the game is I got it just because it was a dollar

The game is comeplete trash, horrible ui, can barely use the items in game, if you move an inch irl you get stuck in a wall, there like 3 dofferent ores to find, all im saying is if you buy this good luck trying to play it.

reviews.review_title: Decent game but I have a loop bug
reviews.review_description: Finding the final infinity stone causes a game loop therefore making it impossible to progress
Lost my pickaxe didn’t have the money for another one waste of money

reviews.review_title: Worse than ever now I get about 2 minute
reviews.review_description: Good fun game but keep getting large black square appear in front of screen then have to switch game off. It doesn't happen in any other apps and it's happened since I purchased the game, shame because it spoils the fun when you are halfway through a game

developer_response.body: This is unfortunate, sorry for your bad experience. This hasn't happened in our internal or Oculus testing so very hard finding if it's us or the platform. It would help if you could send us a screenshot or an image of if at support@mekiwi.org though!

reviews.review_description: I thought all you did was just go up and down in a mineshaft I could not have been more wrong
I love the game bro it's so fun finding all the secrits in the game I like the train such a sick game for a poribol sistum it just sucks the qwest can't handle beter graphics for the game

As I been playing this game I’ve been liking it more In more at first you start by mining to buy more accessories and gadgets. You also can go outside and ride a train to go in a cave and mine so I think you should try it for the $2 bucks it is right now
I wish there was more upgrades to buy but still a really fun game in general

This game is great and all ONLY if your a chill gamer, if you like action or faster paced games this is not for you. I’ve probably played 5 hours worth of this game and it’s a little buggy here and there but very slow progression wise. You have to get used to doing almost the same thing the whole time. An example of games like this are any Roblox tycoon.

This game is like if a mobile game had a baby with a Chinese sweat shop worker... 
and I mean that in the best way possible 
This games upgrade system always keeps you coming back for more
And it honestly would be a field day for speed runners!

I just got this game and I already have so much to do. The mining does get repetitive but then you buy a new tool to mine with and it never gets old. Every time I play it there is something new to discover and more exploring to do. I’m not even close to completing it but if you love tycoon games you’ll love this game.

I honestly would’ve been content with a couple hours of gameplay I’m now almost 13 hours in and it’s been the most fun the upgrades are fun the train is so so much fun to mess with pretty decent graphics and an overall unique atmosphere literally one of the only games like it on the store if you are at all considering getting this game even if it’s back to full price it is 100% worth it!!!
It's amazing! You can go outside, on a train, different areas to mine. It has an infinity gauntlet!!

developer_response.body: You might like the sequel, now on App Lab early access! https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/4687168774709280/

reviews.review_description:
First off great game I played this game a ton and had a lot of fun in the process but my whole game reset and now I am back at nothing which sucks a lot for me because that’s a lot of progress that went down the drain

Also quick suggestion I think you should make a button to skip the ending credits because it becomes a pain to go through them over and over

developer_response.body: Hi and thanks for the comment! Sorry for your troubles, could you please explain what happened to support@mekiwi.org so we can try to correct it? One star rating for a great game does sound weird so let us help you!
